flowers.name: Peony Sarah Bernhardt
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, change daily
flowers.notes: Beautiful full bloom, long lasting

flowers.name: Explorer Red Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Remove lower leaves, fresh water daily
flowers.notes: Deep red color, excellent longevity

flowers.name: Blue Hydrangea
flowers.careInstructions: Keep stems in water constantly
flowers.notes: Full heads, great filler flower

flowers.name: White Calla Lily
flowers.careInstructions: Keep cool, change water frequently
flowers.notes: Elegant and sophisticated

flowers.name: Sunbeam Sunflower
flowers.careInstructions: Change water every 2 days
flowers.notes: Bright and cheerful, long lasting

flowers.name: English Lavender
flowers.careInstructions: Dry or fresh, very hardy
flowers.notes: Fragrant, excellent for arrangements

flowers.name: Juliet Garden Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Iconic David Austin garden rose, exceptional apricot-peach colouring

flowers.name: Quicksand Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Hugely popular dusty blush-mauve rose, a wedding staple

flowers.name: Amnesia Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Distinctive mauve-purple hue, moody and dramatic

flowers.name: Black Baccara Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Deepest darkest red, almost black — a true showstopper

flowers.name: Mondial Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Classic large-headed white rose, perfect for bridal work

flowers.name: Avalanche Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: One of the most reliable white roses, superb vase life

flowers.name: Cappuccino Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Warm peach-orange tones, coffee-coloured edges as it ages

flowers.name: Tiffany Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Deeply fragrant pink with high-centred bud, bridal favourite

flowers.name: Blue Moon Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Rare lavender-lilac rose with intense perfume

flowers.name: Princess Diana Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Bright candy-pink, excellent stem length and longevity

flowers.name: Coral Reef Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Vibrant coral-orange, great for tropical and summer arrangements

flowers.name: Champagne Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Cream with a warm blush flush, endlessly elegant

flowers.name: Sweet Akito Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: White petals with delicate pink blush edges, very popular

flowers.name: Garden Spirit Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Full garden-rose form with dusky pink blooms

flowers.name: Red Naomi Rose
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems at 45° angle, remove lower leaves, change water daily
flowers.notes: Rich velvety red, superb stem length, one of Kenya's finest

flowers.name: Bowl of Beauty Peony
flowers.careInstructions: Store in cool water, remove guard petals gently, trim daily
flowers.notes: Japanese-form peony with hot pink outer petals and cream centre

flowers.name: Red Charm Peony
flowers.careInstructions: Store in cool water, remove guard petals gently, trim daily
flowers.notes: Fully double bomb-form peony in rich scarlet red

flowers.name: Karl Rosenfield Peony
flowers.careInstructions: Store in cool water, remove guard petals gently, trim daily
flowers.notes: Classic double peony in deep crimson-magenta

flowers.name: Festiva Maxima Peony
flowers.careInstructions: Store in cool water, remove guard petals gently, trim daily
flowers.notes: White double peony with distinctive red-flecked inner petals

flowers.name: Queen of Night Tulip
flowers.careInstructions: Keep upright in cool water, wrap in paper to straighten stems
flowers.notes: Deep maroon-purple, almost black — the most dramatic tulip

flowers.name: Angelique Tulip
flowers.careInstructions: Keep upright in cool water, wrap in paper to straighten stems
flowers.notes: Fully double peony-like tulip in soft blush-pink

flowers.name: Parrot Tulip
flowers.careInstructions: Keep upright in cool water, wrap in paper to straighten stems
flowers.notes: Flamboyant fringed petals in pink-red, highly decorative

flowers.name: White Dream Tulip
flowers.careInstructions: Keep upright in cool water, wrap in paper to straighten stems
flowers.notes: Pure ivory white, a clean and versatile choice

flowers.name: Monte Carlo Tulip
flowers.careInstructions: Keep upright in cool water, wrap in paper to straighten stems
flowers.notes: Buttery yellow double tulip with peony-like fullness

flowers.name: Purple Prince Tulip
flowers.careInstructions: Keep upright in cool water, wrap in paper to straighten stems
flowers.notes: Deep purple single tulip with a silvery sheen on the petals

flowers.name: Orange Princess Tulip
flowers.careInstructions: Keep upright in cool water, wrap in paper to straighten stems
flowers.notes: Double tulip in bright orange with flushed pink tips

flowers.name: Casa Blanca Lily
flowers.careInstructions: Remove anthers to prevent pollen staining, change water every 2 days
flowers.notes: The queen of white lilies — intensely fragrant, pure white blooms

flowers.name: Stargazer Lily
flowers.careInstructions: Remove anthers to prevent pollen staining, change water every 2 days
flowers.notes: Upward-facing pink and white blooms with powerful fragrance

flowers.name: Tiger Lily
flowers.careInstructions: Remove anthers to prevent pollen staining, change water every 2 days
flowers.notes: Nodding orange blooms with black spots, wildly dramatic

flowers.name: Pink Asiatic Lily
flowers.careInstructions: Remove anthers to prevent pollen staining, change water every 2 days
flowers.notes: Unscented pink lily that makes a bold colour statement

flowers.name: Golden Oriole Lily
flowers.careInstructions: Remove anthers to prevent pollen staining, change water every 2 days
flowers.notes: Golden yellow petals flushed with orange, warm and sunny

flowers.name: Regale Lily
flowers.careInstructions: Remove anthers to prevent pollen staining, change water every 2 days
flowers.notes: Trumpet-shaped white lily with yellow throat, a cottage garden classic

flowers.name: Café au Lait Dahlia
flowers.careInstructions: Cut stems at angle underwater, keep in cool water
flowers.notes: The most-pinned dahlia on the internet — creamy caramel perfection

flowers.name: Bishop of Llandaff Dahlia
flowers.careInstructions: Cut stems at angle underwater, keep in cool water
flowers.notes: Single red blooms with dark foliage — a classic garden dahlia

flowers.name: Karma Choc Dahlia
flowers.careInstructions: Cut stems at angle underwater, keep in cool water
flowers.notes: Dark maroon-chocolate blooms with velvety texture

flowers.name: Wizard of Oz Dahlia
flowers.careInstructions: Cut stems at angle underwater, keep in cool water
flowers.notes: Bright yellow-orange bicolour, full decorative form

flowers.name: Edinburgh Dahlia
flowers.careInstructions: Cut stems at angle underwater, keep in cool water
flowers.notes: White petals tipped with purple, a striking bi-colour dahlia

flowers.name: Mystic Illusion Dahlia
flowers.careInstructions: Cut stems at angle underwater, keep in cool water
flowers.notes: Bright yellow single dahlia with dark contrasting foliage

flowers.name: Peaches and Cream Dahlia
flowers.careInstructions: Cut stems at angle underwater, keep in cool water
flowers.notes: Lush decorative dahlia in soft pink and cream tones

flowers.name: White Phalaenopsis Orchid
flowers.careInstructions: Mist daily, keep in indirect bright light, avoid cold drafts
flowers.notes: The classic moth orchid, unrivalled vase life of up to 3 weeks

flowers.name: Purple Dendrobium Orchid
flowers.careInstructions: Mist daily, keep in indirect bright light, avoid cold drafts
flowers.notes: Spray orchid with multiple blooms per stem, perfect for corsages

flowers.name: Pink Cymbidium Orchid
flowers.careInstructions: Mist daily, keep in indirect bright light, avoid cold drafts
flowers.notes: Large waxy blooms on arching sprays, classic orchid elegance

flowers.name: Blue Vanda Orchid
flowers.careInstructions: Mist daily, keep in indirect bright light, avoid cold drafts
flowers.notes: One of the few naturally blue flowers — an extraordinary statement piece

flowers.name: Purple Cattleya Orchid
flowers.careInstructions: Mist daily, keep in indirect bright light, avoid cold drafts
flowers.notes: The corsage orchid — large ruffled purple blooms with sweet scent

flowers.name: Limelight Hydrangea
flowers.careInstructions: Submerge blooms briefly in cold water, keep stems in deep water
flowers.notes: Conical lime-green panicles fade to cream and pink, excellent dried

flowers.name: Pink Hydrangea
flowers.careInstructions: Submerge blooms briefly in cold water, keep stems in deep water
flowers.notes: Full mophead blooms in rich pink, a staple for garden-style bouquets

flowers.name: Deep Purple Hydrangea
flowers.careInstructions: Submerge blooms briefly in cold water, keep stems in deep water
flowers.notes: Intense deep purple-blue heads, striking in dark arrangements

flowers.name: Caramel Ranunculus
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, remove lower leaves, trim stems regularly
flowers.notes: Warm cream tones with layered petals like a tiny peony

flowers.name: Red Ranunculus
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, remove lower leaves, trim stems regularly
flowers.notes: Vivid scarlet ranunculus with tissue-paper soft petals

flowers.name: White Ranunculus
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, remove lower leaves, trim stems regularly
flowers.notes: Pure white layered petals, bridal and minimalist arrangements

flowers.name: Blush Ranunculus
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, remove lower leaves, trim stems regularly
flowers.notes: Delicate blush pink — the most popular ranunculus colour

flowers.name: Clove Pink Carnation
flowers.careInstructions: Add flower food, change water every 3 days, trim stems
flowers.notes: Spicy clove fragrance, excellent value and longevity

flowers.name: Scarlet Carnation
flowers.careInstructions: Add flower food, change water every 3 days, trim stems
flowers.notes: Bright scarlet carnation, long-lasting and versatile

flowers.name: White Carnation
flowers.careInstructions: Add flower food, change water every 3 days, trim stems
flowers.notes: Classic white carnation, a florist workhorse

flowers.name: Spider Chrysanthemum
flowers.careInstructions: Remove lower leaves, keep in clean water with flower food
flowers.notes: Quill-like petals radiating from the centre, very structural

flowers.name: Pom Pom Chrysanthemum
flowers.careInstructions: Remove lower leaves, keep in clean water with flower food
flowers.notes: Compact ball-shaped blooms, neat and abundant on each stem

flowers.name: Button Chrysanthemum
flowers.careInstructions: Remove lower leaves, keep in clean water with flower food
flowers.notes: Tiny purple button blooms, ideal filler and textural accent

flowers.name: Scarlet Gerbera
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in shallow water to avoid stem rot, change water frequently
flowers.notes: Bold scarlet daisy face, cheerful and long-lasting

flowers.name: Sunset Orange Gerbera
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in shallow water to avoid stem rot, change water frequently
flowers.notes: Warm orange daisy face, brings energy to any arrangement

flowers.name: Bubblegum Pink Gerbera
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in shallow water to avoid stem rot, change water frequently
flowers.notes: Hot candy-pink, a favourite for children's and celebratory work

flowers.name: White Freesia
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, they open progressively, trim daily
flowers.notes: One of the most fragrant flowers available — pure white blooms

flowers.name: Yellow Freesia
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, they open progressively, trim daily
flowers.notes: Sunshine yellow with an intense sweet fragrance

flowers.name: Purple Freesia
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, they open progressively, trim daily
flowers.notes: Deep violet freesia, fragrant and elegant

flowers.name: White Lisianthus
flowers.careInstructions: Change water every 2 days, remove lower leaves, keep cool
flowers.notes: Often mistaken for a rose or peony — exceptional vase life

flowers.name: Purple Lisianthus
flowers.careInstructions: Change water every 2 days, remove lower leaves, keep cool
flowers.notes: Rich purple with ruffled petals, a romantic and refined bloom

flowers.name: Blush Pink Lisianthus
flowers.careInstructions: Change water every 2 days, remove lower leaves, keep cool
flowers.notes: Soft blush pink that pairs beautifully with garden roses

flowers.name: White Anemone
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, they drink heavily, refresh daily
flowers.notes: White petals with a striking dark centre — graphic and modern

flowers.name: Purple Anemone
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, they drink heavily, refresh daily
flowers.notes: Jewel-toned purple anemone with a bold black eye

flowers.name: Red Anemone
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, they drink heavily, refresh daily
flowers.notes: Brilliant red petals with contrasting black stamens

flowers.name: Pink Sweet Pea
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems daily, keep in cool fresh water, avoid heat
flowers.notes: Intensely fragrant and utterly romantic, a spring essential

flowers.name: Purple Sweet Pea
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems daily, keep in cool fresh water, avoid heat
flowers.notes: Deep lavender-purple blooms with a heavenly scent

flowers.name: White Sweet Pea
flowers.careInstructions: Trim stems daily, keep in cool fresh water, avoid heat
flowers.notes: Pure white with a light floral perfume, a bridal staple

flowers.name: Orange Alstroemeria
flowers.careInstructions: Remove lower leaves, change water every 2-3 days
flowers.notes: Brilliant orange with streaked inner petals, superb longevity

flowers.name: Pink Alstroemeria
flowers.careInstructions: Remove lower leaves, change water every 2-3 days
flowers.notes: Soft pink with intricate markings, excellent filler flower

flowers.name: Yellow Alstroemeria
flowers.careInstructions: Remove lower leaves, change water every 2-3 days
flowers.notes: Bright golden-yellow, ideal for sunny and tropical arrangements

flowers.name: White Snapdragon
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in deep water, remove lower leaves, remove bottom florets as they fade
flowers.notes: Tall white spikes with a gentle fragrance, great vertical element

flowers.name: Pink Snapdragon
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in deep water, remove lower leaves, remove bottom florets as they fade
flowers.notes: Soft pink spires that add height and movement to arrangements

flowers.name: Red Snapdragon
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in deep water, remove lower leaves, remove bottom florets as they fade
flowers.notes: Bold red spikes for drama and height in arrangements

flowers.name: Blue Delphinium
flowers.careInstructions: Hollow stems — turn upside down, fill with water, plug with cotton wool
flowers.notes: True blue spires up to 90 cm tall, a garden wedding essential

flowers.name: Purple Delphinium
flowers.careInstructions: Hollow stems — turn upside down, fill with water, plug with cotton wool
flowers.notes: Rich violet-purple spires, magnificent for tall arrangements

flowers.name: Purple Iris
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in shallow cool water, they open from tight buds, very little water needed
flowers.notes: Deep violet with yellow throat, a classic spring statement

flowers.name: Yellow Iris
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in shallow cool water, they open from tight buds, very little water needed
flowers.notes: Golden yellow iris, cheerful and bold in spring arrangements

flowers.name: Hellebore
flowers.careInstructions: Condition by submerging stems in cold water overnight before arranging
flowers.notes: The Lenten rose — moody and beautiful in winter arrangements

flowers.name: Pink Cosmos
flowers.careInstructions: Change water daily, keep cool, trim stems regularly
flowers.notes: Feathery meadow flower in sugar-pink, delicate and airy

flowers.name: Shirley Poppy
flowers.careInstructions: Sear cut stem ends in boiling water to prevent sap loss, then cool water
flowers.notes: Tissue-paper petals in red and pink, wild and romantic

flowers.name: Baby's Breath
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in clean water, minimal care needed
flowers.notes: The ultimate filler flower — cloud-like masses of tiny white blooms

flowers.name: Purple Allium
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, stems may have faint onion scent when cut
flowers.notes: Perfectly round purple globe on a tall slender stem — very architectural

flowers.name: King Protea
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in clean water, remove leaves below waterline
flowers.notes: South Africa's national flower — a dramatic centrepiece bloom

flowers.name: Wax Flower
flowers.careInstructions: Very hardy, keep in fresh water, remove lower stems
flowers.notes: Tiny star-shaped blooms with a pleasant herbal fragrance, dries beautifully

flowers.name: Sea Lavender
flowers.careInstructions: Hardy filler, keep in fresh water or dry naturally upside down
flowers.notes: Tiny purple papery flowers that hold their colour even when dried

flowers.name: Anthurium
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in clean water, avoid direct sunlight and cold draughts
flowers.notes: Waxy heart-shaped spathe in lacquer red — tropical and long-lasting

flowers.name: Bird of Paradise
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in deep water, open individual florets by gently pulling them out
flowers.notes: Exotic orange and blue blooms that unfurl over several days

flowers.name: Foxglove
flowers.careInstructions: Toxic — handle with care and wash hands after. Keep in fresh cool water
flowers.notes: Towering cottage-garden spires with spotted bells — utterly dramatic

flowers.name: Grape Hyacinth
flowers.careInstructions: Keep in cool water, handle gently as stems are delicate
flowers.notes: Tiny cobalt-blue grape-like clusters with a sweet musky scent
